## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.6

### Camera Recording Notifications
- Fixes the camera event blueprint so it reads Motion event entity attributes from `trigger.to_state.attributes`.
- Allows the blueprint to use the X-Sense `recording_url` playback path when the Motion event entity has recording data.
- Removes the user-facing fallback text that said no playback URL was included.

### Validation
- Updates blueprint regression coverage for the event entity trigger data source.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
